query: SELECT id, contactName, contactPhone, status, classification, duration, teamMemberName, LEFT(recordingUrl, 50) as recording_preview, CASE WHEN transcript IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_transcript, callTimestamp FROM calls WHERE status IN ('pending', 'transcribing', 'classifying', 'grading');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, contactName, contactPhone, status, classification, duration, teamMemberName, LEFT(recordingUrl, 50) as recording_preview, CASE WHEN transcript IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_transcript, callTimestamp FROM calls WHERE status IN ('pending', 'transcribing', 'classifying', 'grading');
